title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Semantics Case: Operator Precedence
summary: Route support cases through explicit rules and iterate changing record sets without truthiness or termination defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js operator precedence increment in a transparent support-case routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict expression grouping, short-circuit evaluation, assignment, optional chaining, and nullish coalescing.
Reason about reachability, event-listener cleanup, weak references, and accidental retention without manual memory control.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
